title: Sanz: Lo que fui es lo que soy
original_title: SANZ: Lo que fui es lo que soy
overview: This documentary follows the life and career of the Spanish singer Alejandro Sanz, from his beginnings and his rise to fame until June 24, 2017 day of his legendary concert "+ es +" in Madrid
